creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
Trix Farrar wrote:
> On Fri, Feb 06, 2009 at 10:29:02AM -0500, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
>> Mixing of devel/apr and www/apache20's apr is not supported by mod_perl2.
> 
> Then shouldn't it be registered as a conflict in either devel/apr or
> www/mod_perl2?  If it had been a conflict, I wouldn't have gotten
> myself into this mess.
> 
Possibly, probably not.

What is installing devel/apr ?

$ cat /var/db/pkg/apr*/+REQUIRED_BY

Whatever is installing apr should probably be using the one from www/apache20
since thats what you were asking for in /etc/make.conf.
